run_5_triage.evidence_source: github_actions_job_logs (blob artifact download blocked by network egress policy)

run_6_triage.evidence_source: github_actions_job_logs (blob artifact download blocked by network egress policy)

run_7_triage.evidence_source: untriaged — API/token success recorded; no artifact or job-log triage available for this record

run_8_triage.failure_cause: final push failed — main had advanced after persist-ledger committed the API usage ledger (push-race condition; hardening merged in PR #115)

paid_credit_api_calls.note: apply_reached/evaluate_reached/adoption_gate_ever_passed/promote_reached reflect the best-known cumulative state across all triaged runs 1-8. data/api_usage_ledger.json records 8 primary-model success records. Runs 5 and 6 are triaged as evaluate_rejected. Run 7 (2026-06-16T06:20:37) is API/token success only and remains untriaged. Run 8 (2026-06-17, id=27683267711) passed the adoption gate and reached promote, but the final promote push failed due to a push-race condition (main had advanced after persist-ledger committed the ledger entry); candidate was not promoted. Runs 5 and 6 historical scores (494.48 and 478.12) were computed under the old formula; they remain historical records only.

propose_side_hardening.meaning: The Gemini propose prompt now states an explicit baseline-preservation contract: keep all five symbolic indicators (path_traversal_indicator, script_injection_indicator, sqli_indicator, command_delimiter_indicator, encoded_traversal_indicator), keep the full request inspection surface (method, path, query, headers, body), keep the final non-blocking blocked=False fallback return, and make a minimal additive edit that scores strictly above previous_best. Prompt-only/documentation change; no API call, no detector/policy/budget/model/ledger change.

score_schema_migration.new_best_score_meaning: Recomputed for current core/detector.py under the generation-invariant formula (changed_lines excluded). This is a score-schema migration only, not a promotion.
score_schema_migration.runs_5_6_historical_note: Runs 5 and 6 scores (494.48 and 478.12) are historical records under the old formula. They remain classified as evaluate_rejected under their recorded historical gate. The new formula does not retroactively change their classification.
score_schema_migration.run_7_note: The 7th primary-model success record remains API/token success only and untriaged. This migration does not infer apply, evaluate, adoption, or promote from run 7.
